lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਚੇਤਈ ਸਭ ਬਾਧੀ ਜਮਕਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: andhee naam na chetee sabh baadhee jamakaal |
lines.english: The spiritually blind do not even think of the Naam; they are all bound and gagged by the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਧਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਰਿਦੈ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: satagur miliai dhan paaeaa har naamaa ridai samaal |3|
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, the wealth is obtained, contemplating the Name of the Lord in the heart. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਹਉ ਕਰਤੀ ਜਗੁ ਫਿਰੀ ਨਾ ਧਨੁ ਸੰਪੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: hau hau karatee jag firee naa dhan sanpai naal |
lines.english: Practicing egotism, selfishness and conceit, she wanders around the world, but her wealth and property will not go with her.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਨਿਰਮਲੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naam rate se niramale gur kai sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: Those who are attuned to the Naam are immaculate and pure; through the Guru, they obtain intuitive peace and poise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਰਾਤਾ ਰੰਗ ਸਿਉ ਰਸਨਾ ਰਸਨ ਰਸਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man tan raataa rang siau rasanaa rasan rasaae |
lines.english: Their minds and bodies are dyed in the Color of the Lord's Love, and their tongues savor His Sublime Essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰੰਗੁ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਧੁਰਿ ਛੋਡਿਆ ਲਾਇ ॥੪॥੧੪॥੪੭॥
lines.translit: naanak rang na utarai jo har dhur chhoddiaa laae |4|14|47|
lines.english: O Nanak, that Primal Color which the Lord has applied, shall never fade away. ||4||14||47||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਭਗਤਿ ਕੀਜੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh kripaa kare bhagat keejai bin gur bhagat na hoee |
lines.english: By His Grace one becomes Gurmukh, worshipping the Lord with devotion. Without the Guru there is no devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਚੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਾ ਹੋਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har jeeo saachaa saachee baanee sabad milaavaa hoee |1|
lines.english: The Dear Lord is True, and True is the Word of His Bani. Through the Shabad, we merge with Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੈ ਆਪੁ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਬੂਝੈ ਤਾ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: aapai aap milaae boojhai taa niramal hovai soee |
lines.english: Those whom He unites with Himself, understand and become pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਭਗਤਿਹੀਣੁ ਕਾਹੇ ਜਗਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re bhagatiheen kaahe jag aaeaa |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny: those who lack devotion-why have they even bothered to come into the world?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵ ਨ ਕੀਨੀ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: poore gur kee sev na keenee birathaa janam gavaaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: They do not serve the Perfect Guru; they waste away their lives in vain. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape jagajeevan sukhadaataa aape bakhas milaae |
lines.english: The Lord Himself, the Life of the World, is the Giver of Peace. He Himself forgives, and unites with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਏ ਕਿਆ ਵੇਚਾਰੇ ਕਿਆ ਕੋ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਣਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant e kiaa vechaare kiaa ko aakh sunaae |
lines.english: So what about all these poor beings and creatures? What can anyone say?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਇ ਵਡਾਈ ਆਪੇ ਸੇਵ ਕਰਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh aape dee vaddaaee aape sev karaae |2|
lines.english: He Himself blesses the Gurmukh with glory. He Himself enjoins us to His Service. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖਿ ਕੁਟੰਬੁ ਮੋਹਿ ਲੋਭਾਣਾ ਚਲਦਿਆ ਨਾਲਿ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: dekh kuttanb mohi lobhaanaa chaladiaa naal na jaaee |
lines.english: Gazing upon their families, people are lured and trapped by emotional attachment, but none will go along with them in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਤਿਸ ਦੀ ਕੀਮ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: satagur sev gun nidhaan paaeaa tis dee keem na paaee |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, one finds the Lord, the Treasure of Excellence. His Value cannot be estimated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਖਾ ਮੀਤੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਅੰਤੇ ਹੋਇ ਸਖਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har prabh sakhaa meet prabh meraa ante hoe sakhaaee |3|
lines.english: The Lord God is my Friend and Companion. God shall be my Helper and Support in the end. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਦਾਤਾ ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲੁ ਹੈ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo daataa bhagat vachhal hai kar kirapaa man vasaaee |
lines.english: The Dear Lord is the Giver, the Lover of His devotees. By His Grace, He comes to dwell in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੈ ਮਨਿ ਚਿਤਿ ਕਹੈ ਕਹਾਏ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਆਪੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aapanai man chit kahai kahaae bin gur aap na jaaee |
lines.english: Within your conscious mind, you may say anything, but without the Guru, selfishness is not removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋਭਾ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਦੇਇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਦੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੪॥੧੫॥੪੮॥
lines.translit: naanak sobhaa surat dee prabh aape guramukh de vaddiaaee |4|15|48|
lines.english: O Nanak, by His Grace, He bestows enlightened awareness; God Himself blesses the Gurmukh with glorious greatness. ||4||15||48||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਜਨਨੀ ਜਿਨਿ ਜਾਇਆ ਧੰਨੁ ਪਿਤਾ ਪਰਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhan jananee jin jaaeaa dhan pitaa paradhaan |
lines.english: Blessed is the mother who gave birth; blessed and respected is the father of one who serves the True Guru and finds peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਗਇਆ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: satagur sev sukh paaeaa vichahu geaa gumaan |
lines.english: His arrogant pride is banished from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਗੁਰ ਮੁਖਿ ਧਿਆਇ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere man gur mukh dhiaae har soe |
lines.english: O my mind, become Gurmukh, and meditate on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਿ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਸੰਤ ਜਨ ਖੜੇ ਪਾਇਨਿ ਗੁਣੀ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dar sevan sant jan kharre paaein gunee nidhaan |1|
lines.english: Standing at the Lord's Door, the humble Saints serve Him; they find the Treasure of Excellence. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਘਰਿ ਆਇਆ ਆਪੇ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa ghar aaeaa aape miliaa aae |
lines.english: By His Grace, He has come into my home; He Himself has come to meet me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad man vasai man tan niramal hoe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad abides within the mind, and the body and mind become pure. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਰੰਗੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee saalaaheeai range sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: Singing His Praises through the Shabads of the Guru, we are dyed in His Color with intuitive ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੈ ਨ ਵਿਛੁੜਿ ਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sachai sach samaaeaa mil rahai na vichhurr jaae |2|
lines.english: Becoming truthful, we merge with the True One; remaining blended with Him, we shall never be separated again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਰੀ ਵਿਛੁੰਨੇ ਮੇਲਿਅਨੁ ਸਤਗੁਰ ਪੰਨੈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: chiree vichhune melian satagur panai paae |
lines.english: Those separated from Him for so long are reunited with Him once again by the True Guru, who takes them into His Own Account.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਣਾ ਸੁ ਕਰਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕਰਣਾ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh karanaa su kar rahiaa avar na karanaa jaae |
lines.english: Whatever is to be done, the Lord is doing. No one else can do anything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਾਰ ਕਰਾਇਸੀ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕਰਣਾ ਜਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape kaar karaaeisee avar na karanaa jaae |3|
lines.english: He Himself assigns all to their tasks; nothing else can be done. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਰਤਾ ਰੰਗ ਸਿਉ ਹਉਮੈ ਤਜਿ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: man tan rataa rang siau haumai taj vikaar |
lines.english: One whose mind and body are imbued with the Lord's Love gives up egotism and corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਪੂਰੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਅਪਾਰ ॥੪॥੧੬॥੪੯॥
lines.translit: naanak aap milaaeian poorai sabad apaar |4|16|49|
lines.english: O Nanak, He blends us with Himself, through the Perfect, Infinite Word of His Shabad. ||4||16||49||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਰਵਿ ਰਹੈ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: ahinis hiradai rav rahai nirbhau naam nirankaar |
lines.english: Day and night, the Name of the One Lord, the Fearless and Formless One, dwells within the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਥਨੀ ਬਦਨੀ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kathanee badanee na paaeeai haumai vichahu jaae |
lines.english: He is not obtained by mouthing mere words, but by rooting out ego from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਵਿਦੁ ਗੁਣੀ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: govid gunee nidhaan hai ant na paaeaa jaae |
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe is the Treasure of Excellence; His limits cannot be found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:
